About
Request a Demo

Detect failures weeks before they happen. From the electrical panel.

SAM4 reads current and voltage signatures at the motor control cabinet. No sensors on the machine. No access to the asset. 24/7 condition monitoring for the 30-40% of critical assets that have no data today.

Request a Demo See How ESA Works

Trusted by

The cost of what you can't see

Most plants rely on vibration sensors and manual rounds. That leaves thousands of critical assets completely unmonitored: submerged pumps, ATEX motors, hard-to-reach drives.

30-40%
of critical rotating assets go unmonitored
Industry data
£390K
potential fine avoided from a single detection
Yorkshire Water
70,000
manual inspection trips replaced per year
Yorkshire Water
€50K+
saved per avoided unplanned shutdown
ArcelorMittal
Understand the monitoring blind spot →

The monitoring gap isn't a priority problem. It's a physics problem.

Vibration sensors need physical access to the machine. For submerged pumps, enclosed drives, and hazardous-zone motors, that access doesn't exist. Per-asset sensor installation means shutdowns, scaffolding, and confined space entry. The economics don't scale. So plants monitor their most accessible assets and leave the rest to manual rounds and run-to-failure. The assets with the highest consequence of failure carry the least data.

Find the answers that matter to you

Different roles need different proof. Pick your path.

Reliability Engineer What does ESA detect on my assets? Fault detection logic, coverage boundaries, and accuracy data for pumps, fans, compressors, and motors. See detection capabilities →
Operations Director What's the business case? Named customer results, ROI data, and quantified outcomes from plants running SAM4 in production. See customer results →
Digital Director How does this fit our digital strategy? Enterprise architecture, fleet-wide scalability, integration with SAP and Maximo, and vendor viability. See the strategic case →
Energy Manager Can this reduce our energy waste? Motor efficiency monitoring, energy anomaly detection, and quantified savings from operational optimisation. See energy impact →

The Technology

Monitor from the cabinet. Not the machine.

Every AC motor draws a unique current and voltage signature. When a bearing degrades, a coupling misaligns, or cavitation develops, the signature changes. SAM4 captures these changes at the motor control cabinet and diagnoses the fault before failure.

Install
Clip-on sensors at the MCC. No field access. No production interruption.
Capture
Continuous current and voltage signatures sampled 24/7. AI monitors the health score.
Detect
Algorithms spot anomalies weeks before failure. Expert-validated alerts. 0.32% false positive rate.
Act
Diagnostic reports push to your CMMS. Scheduled maintenance, not emergency repair.

One system. Hardware to work order. SAM4 includes the measurement hardware, the analytics engine, the monitoring platform, and the reliability engineers who validate every alert. Your team makes the maintenance decisions. We make sure they have the data to make them right.

How ESA detects faults → See the full platform →

What SAM4 delivers

Prevent unplanned downtime
SAM4 detects bearing failures, cavitation, and misalignment weeks before breakdown. Maintenance teams get diagnostic reports with recommended actions. No surprises.
See customer results →
Reduce maintenance costs
Replace scheduled inspections with condition-based interventions. Yorkshire Water eliminated 70,000 inspection trips per year. Average customer payback: 11 months.
See the ROI data →
Monitor the unmonitorable
Submerged pumps, ATEX-zone motors, inaccessible drives. ESA monitors from the electrical panel. No sensors on the machine. No access to the asset required.
See monitored assets →

The assets SAM4 monitors

Every AC-motor-driven asset is a candidate. These are the ones with the deepest deployment data.

Pumps
Bearing failure · Cavitation · Impeller wear · Dry running · Seal degradation

Deployed across Water, Oil & Gas, Metals & Mining, Chemicals, and Pulp & Paper

Monitoring the assets your industry can't reach

SAM4 is deployed across five heavy industries. Each has assets that vibration sensors cannot access. Find yours.

Water & Wastewater
1,000+ pumping stations monitored. 70,000 inspection trips replaced per year. Pollution events prevented before they reach the environment.
See water deployments →
Oil & Gas
ESPs monitored from surface switchgear. ATEX-zone motors covered without entering hazardous areas. Safe-zone monitoring from the MCC.
See oil & gas deployments →
Metals & Mining
Bearing faults detected 5 months before failure on blast furnace cooling pumps. Conveyor gearbox defects caught via gear mesh frequency analysis.
See metals deployments →
Chemicals
40% reduction in equipment downtime across 3 European sites. 15+ failures detected in 3 years. Full fleet coverage in hours, not months.
See chemicals deployments →
Pulp & Paper
7.1% pump efficiency improvement. Energy waste identified on drives operating below optimal load. Reliability and energy in one platform.
See pulp & paper deployments →
Airports
9 out of 9 baggage handling failures detected at Schiphol. Stansted deployed SAM4 across terminal operations. Zero unplanned downtime on monitored assets.

See all customer results →

Common questions

What is Electrical Signature Analysis?

ESA monitors the electrical current flowing to a motor. Deviations in that current reveal early faults. Think of it as a health check for equipment, captured from the electrical panel. No sensors on the machine.

What types of equipment can SAM4 monitor?

Any AC-motor-driven asset: pumps, fans, compressors, conveyors, transmissions, ESPs, and more. If it has a motor and a cable, SAM4 can monitor it from the MCC. See the full list →

How long does installation take?

Under 60 minutes per asset. Split-core CTs clip onto existing cables at the motor control cabinet. No production shutdown. No field access. Your equipment keeps running.

What's the typical ROI?

Most customers see payback within 11 months. A single prevented failure on a critical pump can avoid tens of thousands in repair costs, lost production, and environmental penalties.

How does SAM4 integrate with our existing systems?

Via REST API or MQTT. SAM4 integrates with SAP PM, IBM Maximo, and most CMMS platforms. Samotics handles the setup. Diagnostic reports push directly into your existing work order flow.

How is this different from vibration monitoring?

Vibration sensors need physical access to the machine. For submerged pumps, enclosed drives, and hazardous-zone motors, that access doesn't exist. ESA works on any asset connected to an electrical panel. It complements vibration on accessible assets and covers the rest. See the comparison →

The Platform

One platform. Every motor. 24/7.

  • Fleet-level asset health dashboard
  • AI-driven anomaly detection and alerting
  • Diagnostic reports with recommended actions
  • CMMS integration: SAP PM, IBM Maximo
